	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'select * from [PLHS].[dbo].[tbl_VulnActive_Daily_PIT_MetricsSource] where pit_date between \'2/12/2024\' and \'2/29/2024\'',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> Pit
Pit split(PIT_Date < (toDate(toString('3/1/2024', 'MM/dd/yyyy'), "MM/dd/yyyy")), disjoint: true) ~> ConditionalSplit@(Case1,ConditionalSplitDefaultOutput)
ConditionalSplit@Case1 derive({Copy of TCOOActions} = toString(TCOOActions)) ~> DataConversion
